generated_by: manual authoring; ground_truth computed via scripts/compute_ground_truth.py
notes: Adult is a flat table — no joins. Questions cover aggregation, filtering, and missing-value awareness.
Column names use hyphens (e.g. 'education-num'), so they MUST be quoted in SQL.

questions.text_pt: Qual a idade media em adult?
questions.text_en: What is the average age in the adult table?
How many rows are in the adult table?

questions.text_pt: Quantos niveis de education distintos existem?
questions.text_en: How many distinct education levels are there?
How many rows have workclass NULL (missing)?
questions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adult WHERE workclass IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adult WHERE class = '>50K'

questions.text_pt: Qual a idade media das pessoas com class = '>50K'?
questions.text_en: What is the average age of people with class = '>50K'?
questions.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(age), 2) FROM adult WHERE class = '>50K'
SELECT sex, COUNT(*) FROM adult GROUP BY sex ORDER BY sex

questions.text_pt: Qual a occupation mais comum (excluindo nulos)?
questions.text_en: What is the most common occupation (excluding NULLs)?
questions.sql: SELECT occupation FROM adult WHERE occupation IS NOT NULL GROUP BY occupation ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

questions.text_pt: Qual a media de 'hours-per-week' para cada class?
questions.text_en: What is the average 'hours-per-week' per class?
questions.sql: SELECT class, ROUND(AVG("hours-per-week"), 2) FROM adult GROUP BY class ORDER BY class
